programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jasmine Harman helps Angela and Steve from Leicestershire search for a second home in Lanzarote that they can move to permanently after retirement, with a budget of £225,000

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien meet a woman whose family have raced cars for three generations, and Simon comes across an old ship's carpenter's chest he can restore

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien are in Woking, where they find a sidecar to be transformed into a boat and a water cylinder that Simon might make a trendy lamp

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Dick Strawbridge and Angel Adoree await the arrival of their guests, who are expecting a luxurious Christmas at the chateau. Dick continues work on installing the lift, but the project tests his ingenuity to the limit, while Angel finds more valuables in the attic, including a collection of vinyl records

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: Charlie Luxton heads to Devon to help some turkey farmers who are desperate to finally put a proper roof over their kids' heads. After a decade living in makeshift accommodation, Daniel and Elaine Mason are building a family home on the family farm, but Charlie's worried the budget won't keep pace with their architectural ambition. The designs look complicated and costly, and when the first bills come in, his worst fears are realised

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition heads to Anglesey, where best pals Richard Tuke and Susan Hatch hope to show that Blackthorn Farm B&B, which they own, is better than any of their guests' establishments. However, they find that their close friendship is scrutinised even more than their property

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The White Swan Hotel in Yeadon, West Yorkshire, is the second stop of the competition, and owners Graham and Barbara Yellow hope their basic facilities and affordable prices will please their guests. Spiritual couple Malcolm and Fiona Piers-Taylor get good vibes from their room, Rachel Lonergan views the hosts in a new light and breakfast is well received by the contestants, despite having to pay a supplement fee

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Vegetarians Malcolm and Fiona Piers-Taylor host at the Old Mill House B&B in Bridport, Dorset, and both come under attack at dinner when Malcolm voices his opinions on meat eating. In the morning, a meditation session gets a mixed response, and most of the guests are left cold by the vegetarian buffet breakfast

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Rachel and Dan Lonergan welcome their guests to the Brighton Inn, East Sussex, where they hope to offer a luxury, boutique experience. Malcolm and Fiona Piers-Taylor give their room a thorough inspection, before the groups learns the art of building a human pyramid in the afternoon's activity. At breakfast, they discover a lack of vegetarian alternatives, and the hosts suspect game-playing when they are shocked by some negative feedback

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners come together to confront their rivals and find out how much they have been paid. Richard and Susan are keen to tackle the bathroom issues of Barbara and Graham, who bask in the comments from Malcolm and Fiona. The Old Mill House proprietors defend their vegetarian breakfast routine, but serve up snobby feedback to Rachel and Dan from the Brighton Inn

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Rothschild giraffe Orla is about to give birth to her second calf but is three weeks overdue. This episode captures the arrival of the giraffe family's youngest member and its introduction to the rest of the herd. Cameras also follow the Chester team as they attempt to save mountain chicken frogs from extinction, and there's a look at the secret world of three disruptive aardvarks

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer meet Christine Attwood and Tony Congdon in Purley, Croydon, who need help deciding whether they should sell or upgrade their home. The pair have been going back and forth for almost a decade about the future of their unusual bungalow - Tony loves the property and its location, but Christine longs to move closer to the coast to enjoy her retirement

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Two-and-a-half years have passed since Dick and Angel Strawbridge swapped their flat in Southend for a 19th-century chateau in France costing only £280,000, and in that time, the pair have worked to transform the derelict property into a fairytale castle. However, around half of the 45 rooms are yet to receive adequate attention, the couple's fledgling events business demands attention, and the outbuildings are still in need of conversion

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud follows former blacksmith Alan Dawson, who has devised a way of building that should allow him to complete his home in just seven days. The method resembles that of a giant toy construction, with wiring, lighting, plumbing and carpets built into sections that are then taken to the site by lorry - but precision is critical if the house is to fit together

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: This episode follows the stories of people who have lived through tragic, life-changing events, and explores how these individuals endure with the strength and support of their loved ones. An 86-year-old man is rushed to St Georges by paramedics after a suspected stroke, while an 80-year-old woman is seen by doctors after falling and sustaining an open fracture to her leg. On the paediatric ward, a mother has brought her 14-year-old daughter to see a doctor after she hurt her ankle during gymnastics

programme.title: Two Sisters, One Body
programme.desc: A coming-of-age story of two Omphalopagus twins. About to leave high school Carmen and Lupita have more than their grades or their rare conjoined condition to think about, they are Mexicans in President Donald Trump's America. Now is a key turning point in their life as their American dream threatens to come to an end

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the comedy game show, with team captains Sean Lock and Jon Richardson joined by comedians Katherine Ryan and Rob Beckett. Comedian Greg Davies is in Dictionary Corner with Susie Dent, while Rachel Riley provides the letters and numbers

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: A look at what happened after Gordon Ramsay headed to Scottsdale, Arizona, where he met husband-and-wife bistro owners Samy and Amy Bouzaglo, who revealed a shocking contempt for customer feedback. The chef faced the biggest challenge of the series to save Amy's Baking Company - and a media furore unfolded after the episode was broadcast

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: A selection of previous investigations from the programme delving into the secrets behind mass-produced food. Jimmy Doherty looks into the reasons why so many consumers are avoiding gluten, and Matt Tebbutt finds out which part of the pig goes into chewy sweets

programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien visit Herefordshire to meet former farmer Julian. Henry finds an old cattle feeder that he wants to turn into a garden bench, while Simon hatches plans to turn a vintage seed drill into a trendy dining table

However, around half of the 45 rooms are yet to receive adequate attention, the couple's fledgling events business demands attention, and the outbuildings are still in need of conversion

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: Charlie Luxton is in Gloucestershire, helping first-time self-builders Karen and Colin Thompson build a family home with a modern twist. Charlie has lots of suggestions, but the Thompsons have their own ideas and don't always agree with him. They're going for an ultra-modern metal roof, but Charlie is concerned that the rest of the house doesn't match

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition heads to Charing, Kent, where landlady Natalie Palmer hopes to show that her B&B, The Oak, is better than any of her guests' establishments. Everything starts off well when a couple are delighted to have enough room for their yoga mats, but the rest of the party are unimpressed with the extractor fans

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants visit the White Lady in Worstead, Norfolk, on their second night, where proprietor Dennis Gilligan tells his guests about a spooky presence that resides there. The guests get competitive in a round of clay shooting, and debate whether they believe in the existence of ghosts

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week is to Cranleigh House B&B in Combe Martin, Devon, where former couple Katherine Armitage and Stewart Johnston offer alternative accommodation for those who enjoy yoga and are seeking spiritual enlightenment. They hope the group will send out energy for world peace and healing, but Mike and Denise question whether the whole thing is a joke

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Mike and Denise Mitchell welcome the contestants to Beaches B&B in Paignton, Devon, which only opened for business a few weeks ago. Fellow competitor Katherine puts the owners through their paces at breakfast when she asks for something off the menu, and the hosts are pleasantly surprised at feedback time

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners come together for one last time to discover what they have been paid, and the identity of the winner. The Oak owner Natalie wants to know why some of her guests were not enthused by her extractor fans, but she herself receives aggression from Dennis over her criticism of the White Lady. Katherine and Stuart defend their vegetarian breakfast, and Mike and Denise deal with negative comments about their cereal selection

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: The Hi Way elephants have been hit with a potentially deadly virus, with the youngest members of the family most at risk, and the keepers and Chester Zoo's veterinary team do all they can to combat the mysterious illness. Meanwhile, Mac the stallion zebra is introduced to the zoo's three mares in the hope they will produce much needed offspring for this endangered species. There's also a look into the bizarre world of the naked mole rat

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer catch up with Lucia and Matt, who were split over what to do with their four-bed detached home in Royal Wootton Bassett, Wiltshire. With four cats, two dogs and a yard full of hens, the house was at bursting point. Kirstie heads to the pair's new home in Llangammarch Wells, Powys, where huge changes have occurred, including the addition of a peacock to the household menagerie. Do Lucia and Matt feel they got the life they really wanted after all?

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Dick gets to work on the walled garden in the spring and buys a mini tractor for the job - but it may not fit through the gate. Angel designs another suite, with black walls and mosaic mirrors, and decorates the entire dining room with blossoms so a guest can make a special wedding proposal. The couple also consider the possibility of truffle farming

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud follows the progress of Robert and Milla Gaukroger, as they try to add three extensions to a 1980s property overlooking Windermere in the Lake District. Robert has designed his own heating system to achieve maximum sustainability, but the project begins with only £100,000 of the £400,000 budget in place, and he and his family have to move into the existing building while work goes on around them

programme.title: American Hustle (2013)
programme.desc: A conman is caught in the act by the FBI, but a maverick agent offers him the chance to escape prison by assisting in a sting operation. The hustler finds himself involved in a scheme to bring down the corrupt, Mafia-affiliated politician, only to find his own ex-wife plotting revenge. Crime drama set in the 1970s, starring Christian Bale, Amy Adams, Bradley Cooper and Jennifer Lawrence

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Ninety-one-year-old Cyril is airlifted to hospital after a car crash which required him to be cut from his car. Meanwhile, the medical team treat 57-year-old Caroline, who arrives at St George's with chest pains, plus five-year-old Roman has a pencil stuck in his ear

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole makes a table out of a part from a jet in Tiverton, and Simon O'Brien finds a pair of exhaust pipes which he thinks could become a trendy pair of lamps

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The guests visit the Flower Pot in Sunbury-on-Thames on their second night, where owner Simon Bailey and French manager Pierre Cudon provide stylish continental-inspired accommodation, but the hosts are left puzzled by some of the feedback they receive the next morning

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit is to the family-run Dolphin Hotel in Exmouth, Devon, which has been a life's work for hotelier Jo Knowles. On arrival, Pat and Nigel find a suspicious stain, before the guests put on their war faces for a game of paintball. Jo takes everyone to a floating restaurant for dinner, and the next morning she presents a huge spread for breakfast - but her diners are suspicious that it has been laid on specially for the competition

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants stay at the Mariners Beachside B&B in Seaton, Devon, but are disappointed by the cleanliness of the property. They take part in a town-crying competition during the afternoon, and host Nigel feels under pressure to deliver his award-winning breakfast the next morning. Come feedback time, the owners discover not all their guests share the same opinion

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners meet for the final time to find out what they have been paid, and confront their rivals. Simon Bailey and Pierre Cudon from the Flower Pot feel the feedback left by Nigel and Pat Booth is a step too far, while the Mariners B&B owners hit back at the men's opinion of their establishment's cleanliness. Linda and Kelly Langdown of the Old Times Guest House question the rating of their facilities, while the Dolphin Hotel's Jo Knowles has a confession to make regarding her hosting

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Cameras follow Chester Zoo's four new fledgling Humboldt penguins who are being brought up apart from the main colony until they're old enough to compete for fish in the main pool. They're keen to make a break for it and join the adults, but when they're finally free to go they have other ideas. Elsewhere, Niall the chimpanzee keeper has known chimp Boris for 44 years. When the ape captures a moorhen chick, Niall must use his powers of persuasion to negotiate the safe release of his hostage

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer return to find out how some of the families they have helped are getting on since they decided whether to redesign their problematic homes or sell up and move on. They begin with Paul and Dawn from the first edition back in April 2015, who were at loggerheads over what to do with their detached country home. Its isolated location on the outskirts of Huddersfield made it perfect for astronomy fanatic Paul, but Dawn was desperate to move, hating its dysfunctional layout

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Dick and Angel look ahead to wedding season, with eight couples booking the chateau for their big day. Dick also converts a stone barn into a flat for Angel's parents, getting rid of 150 years' worth of rubbish in the process, but tensions rise between the couple when he gets carried away with the trees at the front of the property

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud revisits a project undertaken by Daren Howarth and Adi Nortje, a couple who moved from Brighton to Brittany to create an earth-sheltered house built almost entirely from recycled materials. Their aim was to enlist the help of unskilled volunteers to work on the home, in exchange for teaching them construction techniques to keep down the costs. The presenter returns to learn how their experiment turned out

programme.title: A Year in the New Forest
programme.desc: A look at life in the New Forest in the spring, a challenging time of year for both people and animals. The semi-wild cattle and ponies that live in the forest face giving birth during changeable weather conditions, while the possibility of a late frost puts a goshawk's eggs at risk

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Cameras follow Lawrence, 26, who is rushed to St George's after being hit by a car while crossing the road on a night out in Eastbourne. Meanwhile, 53-year-old Katrina is brought to A&E after having difficulty breathing and experiencing chest pains that could indicate a heart attack

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the comedy panel show's version of the words and numbers quiz, with Vic Reeves and Sara Pascoe joining team captains Sean Lock and Lee Mack. Alex Horne and the Horne Section join Countdown regular Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner, while Rachel Riley provides the numbers and letters

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: The first episode of the hit comedy. The Craggy Island cleric dreams of achieving stardom on the Faith of Our Fathers TV show - but his hopes are dashed by Jack and Dougal's untimely intervention. Dermot Morgan, Ardal O'Hanlon and Frank Kelly star

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: A sense of dread descends on Craggy Island as the priests prepare for poker-faced Father Stone's annual visit - and Ted tries desperately to think of a scheme to get rid of him. Clerical comedy, starring Dermot Morgan

programme.title: The Accident
programme.desc: Sarah Lancashire stars in the drama set in a fictional Welsh town where an explosion at a construction site that has killed several teenagers. In the aftermath of the tragedy, Polly worries that husband Iwan might be hiding something. Angela gathers the families to fight for justice, and as Harriet faces questions at work, her assistant - and lover - Tim acts to protect her by leaking information that drives a wedge through the town. Co-starring Mark Lewis Jones, Joanna Scanlan and Sidse Babett Knudsen

programme.title: Shocking Emergency Calls
programme.desc: First-hand accounts of deadly wildfires in Paradise, California, that wiped out homes, towns and lives, telling the stories of the emergency responders and those who escaped

programme.desc: Game show in which Jason Byrne challenges people in Weston-super-Mare, Glasgow, Bristol and Newcastle-upon-Tyne to bring back the answer to a question, but not to say it

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Frank saves a vintage muscle car from meeting a rusty end, while Mike falls for a 100-year-old hotrod. A man cave also presents them with some sweet deals

programme.title: Storage Hunters UK
programme.desc: The gang is on Barry and Darren's home turf in Reading, Berkshire, where the pair are determined not to leave empty-handed. Meanwhile, Dan takes a gamble

programme.title: Storage Hunters UK
programme.desc: Sean Kelly and the bidders are in Leamington Spa, and the up-market town brings out the businessman in Heavy D who gets more than he bargained for in one auction

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Pickers Mike Wolfe and Frank Fritz make waves when they hit the road in a one-of-a-kind rocket car

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike, Frank, Robbie and Danielle all hit the road in search of treasure, to see what the jam-packed yards and barns of Virginia have in store for them

programme.title: Red Bull Soapbox Race
programme.desc: Highlights of the offbeat event, where teams create vehicles without engines and race downhill

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: The presenters are challenged to drive from Switzerland to Blackpool on just one tank of fuel, and the winner gets to switch on the Blackpool illuminations. James May also power-tests the Pagani Zonda F Roadster, and the Stig sets a lap time in the Bugatti Veyron. Comedian Harry Enfield is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Richard Hammond celebrates the 40th anniversary of the Ferrari Daytona by taking one back to its spiritual home - the Italian Riviera - before trying to beat James May and a powerboat in a race from Portofino to St Tropez. Back in the UK, Jeremy Clarkson tests the BMW M3 saloon and compares it with the Lexus IS-F. Grand Designs presenter Kevin McCloud is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Rick Stein's Mediterranean Escapes
programme.desc: The chef's final trip takes him to Morocco, where he samples the delights of couscous, tagines and mint tea in the country's bazaars, before travelling along the old silk route in south-eastern Turkey to taste kebabs, another of the Mediterranean's favourite foods

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson and James May ask whether the Eastern Bloc countries ever made a good car, and Richard Hammond assesses the performance of German sports model the Veritas. The Ford Fiesta is also put through its paces in a stringent road test, and Mayor of London Boris Johnson is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May test-drive an Aston Martin DBS Convertible, a Ferrari California and a Lamborghini Gallardo Convertible through Romania, searching for the mountain highway built during the reign of the country's former dictator Nicolae Ceausescu - allegedly the best road to drive on in the world. Actor Eric Bana is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: James May's Cars of the People
programme.desc: The presenter continues his examination of how the car became an everyday part of people's lives, exploring the weird world of small vehicles. He discovers how austerity and fears of congestion led to European disasters in the shape of Britain's infamous three-wheelers, French death traps and German absurdities, and also takes to the battlefield to settle one of the greatest rivalries in car history

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: The chef embarks on a series of extended culinary breaks, visiting markets, restaurants, wineries, cafes and bars, looking for food excellence and also some innovative recipes that will encourage viewers to cook at home. He begins his first adventure in autumnal Bordeaux, where he helps judge a local wine contest and hires a 2CV for an excursion to the coast - abundant with mussels and oysters. At home, he cooks a memorable dish of steak frites with Bordelaise sauce

programme.title: Top Gear

programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson spares no expense when he tests the BMW X6. Plus, musician Seasick Steve is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: James May's Cars of the People
programme.desc: James concludes his examination of the social significance of cars by exploring how aspiration and new wealth were behind the development of some of the greatest models ever made. He tries to make sense of the baffling world of company car hierarchy by holding a travelling salesman race-off and indulges his 1980s urges with the twin delights of a Lamborghini and a Porsche. He also unveils his choice of the ultimate people's car - a vehicle that can lay claim to being the greatest in history

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: The chef heads north towards the Arctic Circle to explore the culinary delights of Reykjavik, coastal capital of Iceland. His aim is to enjoy the perfect winter break, enriched with a smorgasbord featuring the best ingredients the country has to offer - fjord-reared roast lamb, rye bread baked in volcanic sand and langoustine soup. Rick also resumes his search for the perfect cod

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson gets behind the wheel of a Reliant Robin to investigate the reasons behind the lack of three-wheeled cars on the market. The Stig takes the Bentley Continental Supersports for a spin around the test track, and James May fires up the Toyota Hilux for a final challenge - a gruelling drive up Eyjafjallajokull, an active Icelandic volcano that halted flights in British airspace in 2010

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: The three hosts are each given a budget of £5,000 to find a car that can hold its own on a racetrack and handle everyday tasks, before testing their purchases in Germany. James May puts two Porsches through their paces on the Top Gear test circuit, and former Downing Street communications director Alastair Campbell tries out the Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: James May's Cars of the People
programme.desc: The presenter examines how the car industry in Germany and Japan blossomed following the Second World War, becoming manufacturing giants that far outstripped the Allied nations that had defeated them. He test drives some of the vehicles Germany and Japan produced during the post-war period, as well as an assortment of other classic cars, including E-Types and Mustangs. He also reveals the sad tale of the Austin Allegro, a vehicle that had a devastating impact on the British car industry

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?

programme.desc: Comedians Lolly Adefope, Miles Jupp and Nick Mohammed are given the titles of real lectures and invited to give their own version. Presented by Sara Pascoe

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?
programme.desc: Actor and stage director Derek Jacobi enjoyed a relatively humble upbringing in Leytonstone, London, where his father ran a sweet shop and his mother worked in a drapery, but research into his maternal side of the family soon uncovers a link to a far more intriguing past. Discovering that his great-grandmother's name was Salome Laplain, Jacobi finds that he is descended from a wealthy French Huguenot who fled religious persecution, and who has connections to royalty on this side of the channel

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?
programme.desc: Jerry Hall sets out to discover how her father's family, who she knew were originally from Oldham, ended up in the United States, and her investigation takes her from the cotton mills of Lancashire to the plains of Texas at the time of the railroad. She also explores her mother's side of the family and discovers her ancestors' pioneering roots as they headed west across the United States at the time of the Frontier, and finds out about a connection to the original pioneer and American folk hero, Daniel Boone

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Jamie Theakston travels to Portugal to meet leading experts on the Three Secrets of Fatima - a series of visions and prophecies allegedly given by the Virgin Mary to three young shepherds in 1917

programme.title: True Evil: The Making of a Nazi
programme.desc: Documentary series exploring the motivations of key figures in Hitler's regime, beginning with propaganda master Josef Goebbels

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team head for the attractive gardens of Trelissick, near Truro in Cornwall. Objects under examination include a bust of Winston Churchill found at the bottom of a lake and a group of medals owned by a proud grandson. A lifebelt tells the graphic story of a shipwreck off the Lizard peninsula in which the crew were rescued in desperate circumstances

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Abandoned projects of the space age, including the HARP gun in Barbados and the mountainside Barcroft Observatory in California

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: On the penultimate leg of his journey from Stirling to John O'Groats, Michael Portillo travels from Inverness to Plockton. Along the way he rides on one of the country's most picturesque railways, visits Scotland's smallest station and learns what a spa break in the Victorian era comprised

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo starts off in Invergordon on the final leg of his journey to John O'Groats. Along the way, he learns how one man's vision helped bring train travel to the Highlands, discovers how farming has changed since Bradshaw's day and hears the remarkable tale of Scotland's Victorian gold rush

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents the show from Ightham Mote, a medieval manor near Sevenoaks. Objects brought in to be valued include a set of hold and porcelain false teeth from the 1850s, which triggers a grim look back at the history of dentures. Plus, Walter Scott's walking cane, and two cricket bats dating back to the 18th century

programme.title: Time Team
programme.desc: Archaeological series. In this special edition, Tony Robinson traces the history of the controversial Sevso treasure

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: The spacecraft designed for the first manned mission to Mars, planned to launch by 2035, which requires the most powerful rocket ever built and a specially designed crew module

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: The world's most impressive disused railway bridges, including the biggest wooden trestle bridge in the world, which was closed down due to hurricane damage

programme.title: Nazi Murder Mysteries

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?
programme.desc: Actor and stage director Derek Jacobi enjoyed a relatively humble upbringing in Leytonstone, London, where his father ran a sweet shop and his mother worked in a drapery, but research into his maternal side of the family soon uncovers a link to a far more intriguing past. Discovering that his great-grandmother's name was Salome Laplain, Jacobi finds that he is descended from a wealthy French Huguenot who fled religious persecution, and who has connections to royalty on this side of the channel

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?
programme.desc: Jerry Hall sets out to discover how her father's family, who she knew were originally from Oldham, ended up in the United States, and her investigation takes her from the cotton mills of Lancashire to the plains of Texas at the time of the railroad. She also explores her mother's side of the family and discovers her ancestors' pioneering roots as they headed west across the United States at the time of the Frontier, and finds out about a connection to the original pioneer and American folk hero, Daniel Boone

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?
programme.desc: Gareth Malone becomes the latest celebrity to dig into his family's past in the popular genealogy show. The choirmaster knows he got the singing bug from his parents, who met while acting together in musicals, and now he wants to know how far back this love of the stage goes. He starts out by looking into his mother's side of the family and strikes gold immediately as his investigations take him to the West End. programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray grows tired of Debra's cooking and asks Marie to teach her how to make his favourite dish - spaghetti and meatballs - leading to chaos in the kitchen. Starring Ray Romano, Patricia Heaton and Doris Roberts

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray runs into trouble while trying to show Debra he can take over the running of the family finances, and resorts to a series of elaborate lies to get himself out of the mess he has created. Comedy, starring Ray Romano and Patricia Heaton

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef travels to Newbury Park in southern California to help Mexican restaurant Mama Rita's. The owner previously ran a successful catering company but has struggled to adapt her skills to meet the demands of a new business - and with a year's worth of food stored in the freezer Gordon realises he has a tough job ahead

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Le Bistro in Lighthouse Point, Florida, where the stubborn chef and owner has lost his passion for cooking. The visiting expert hopes to help, but his criticisms are not well received, causing tempers to flare

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jasmine Harman helps recently retired Baksho, who is looking for a holiday home in the resort of Gran Alacant on Spain's popular Costa Blanca and has a budget of £100,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Laura Hamilton helps a couple from Leicester find a holiday home in the quaint villages and beautiful scenery of France's Tarn region, on a budget of £90,000

programme.title: Secret History
programme.desc: Documentary revealing the secret childhood of Queen Victoria's eldest grandson, the future Kaiser Wilhelm II, through a long-hidden cache of intimate family letters. Wilhelm was born with a permanently paralysed arm - a disability considered shameful at the time - and was subjected to a series of bizarre and often cruel attempts to cure the condition. These childhood experiences are believed to have helped create a highly dysfunctional connection between the boy and his mother, Victoria, Princess Royal, and to have shaped his love-hate relationship with her country

programme.title: Grayson Perry's Big American Road Trip
programme.desc: Grayson Perry continues his journey across the pre-pandemic US to explore divisions across the nation. In the second episode, Grayson takes a bike trip down the relatively prosperous east coast, from the liberal holiday playground of Martha's Vineyard, Massachusetts, to a 'woke' enclave of Brooklyn, he explores issues of social class, economic opportunity and access to education, and tries to understand how America's liberals now view their own country

programme.title: Trump: An American Dream
programme.desc: The documentary charts Donald Trump's business dealings in the 1980s, when against his father's advice he entered the casino business - and went on a massive spending spree that included a yacht, an airline, a helicopter and an American football team. He also published a best-selling book - The Art of the Deal. However, as the decade drew to a close, Donald's life began to unravel

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Noel Fielding and Matt Lucas present Bread Week, which kicks off with a sweet and savoury signature round. For the technical challenge, the bakers are asked to create a tribute to the NHS, while the Showstopper is an ambitiously artistic challenge featuring decorative designs in bread. Judges Prue Leith and Paul Hollywood sample their efforts, and choose this week's Star Baker - and this week's departing contestant

programme.title: Married at First Sight
programme.desc: The four applicants meet their match, chosen by a panel of experts. Elsewhere, divorced parents Shareen and David hope to find love second time around and create a blended family for the five children they have between them

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Maître D' Fred Sirieix and his team fling open the doors of the restaurant of romance once more, and first in is self-confessed party animal Nikita - a 24-year-old from Swansea who's hunting for someone just as wild. However, she gets a little more than she bargained for when engineer Rhys reveals a rather intimate tattoo. Part-time fitness instructor and disco dancer Selvin meets Donna, who seeks a man who can make her laugh. Former Playboy bunny Kelly-Ann is a model who's dated some A-list stars in her time and wants 'a daring man' to keep her feeling alive. Will tattooed motorbike daredevil Stephen tickle her fancy?

programme.title: Adult Material
programme.desc: Jolene Dollar - real name Hayley Burrows - is a poster girl for the porn industry and the proud breadwinner in her family. Drama about the porn industry, starring Hayley Squires, Rupert Everett and Julian Ovenden

programme.title: Council House Britain
programme.desc: Southwark council emergency officer Angela installs a personal alarm for 85-year-old Betty. She has been falling down just recently and her husband Fred cannot lift her up. Housing officer Charmain has twisted her ankle but that does not stop her performing her safety checks, hobbling through her estates on crutches, and resident Leslie recalls the Grenfell fire tragedy of 2017, which she witnessed from her own tower block

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Solicitor Allison Hampshire hosts the first dinner party from Portsmouth, focusing on a sophisticated menu and quirky entertainment that she hopes will win her the £1,000 prize. programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Tutor Kathy Anderson hosts the third dinner party from Portsmouth and hopes to impress her guests with a Gallic-inspired menu. programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Stage actor Christopher Marlowe plays host in the fourth dinner party from Portsmouth, and tries to woo his guests with an adventurous menu and theatrical entertainment - including a one-man play involving a drunken waiter, which has a messy outcome

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Brazilian beauty-counter manager Rose Proenca hosts the final dinner party in Portsmouth, hoping her Turkish-themed menu will impress the other contestants. However, the entertainment is not to everyone's taste

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Paul and Michelle from Greater Manchester want to find the perfect place to spend their retirement on Spain's beautiful Costa Cálida, famous for its year-round warmth and relaxing atmosphere. programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Chris and Anne-Marie McNeill from Scotland have fallen in love with the buzzy holiday atmosphere of south Tenerife after visiting regularly for seven years. Now they're looking for a second home where they can enjoy family holidays with their two children, so Laura Hamilton shows them five properties for their £200,000 budget

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray goes on patrol with his policeman brother Robert and ends up foiling a robbery at a local restaurant by pelting the would-be thief with pizza. Comedy, starring Ray Romano

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray enlists his mother's help to reassure Ally, who is afraid to sleep in her own room because she is convinced it becomes the haunt of monsters once the lights go out. Ray Romano stars

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Le Bistro in Lighthouse Point, Florida, where the stubborn chef and owner has lost his passion for cooking. The visiting expert hopes to help, but his criticisms are not well received, causing tempers to flare

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Danni Menzies helps a couple who run a pub-restaurant in County Durham to find a home on the Greek island of Kefalonia on a budget of £120,000

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off

Judges Prue Leith and Paul Hollywood sample their efforts, and choose this week's Star Baker - and this week's departing contestant

programme.title: Murder on the Orient Express (2017)
programme.desc: An American businessman travelling on the Orient Express from Istanbul to Paris tries to hire Hercule Poirot to be his bodyguard as he has had death threats made against him. The sleuth refuses, but wakes up the following morning to learn the man has been stabbed to death while the train was held up by heavy snow - and there is no shortage of suspects among the passengers. Agatha Christie mystery, directed by and starring Kenneth Branagh, with Daisy Ridley, Derek Jacobi and Johnny Depp

programme.title: The World's Most Famous Train
programme.desc: During its nine-month-long season, the Venice Simplon-Orient-Express makes over 60 journeys, covering 150,000 kilometres, with the majority of trips between London and Venice. The train is comprised of 17 unique 1920s carriages that have transported a host of elite individuals across Italy, Switzerland, and Turkey for more than a century. This documentary follows the stories of the staff and passengers as the train makes its way across Europe, with some customers having paid more than £2,000 for the privilege

programme.title: Grayson Perry's Big American Road Trip
programme.desc: Grayson travels through the swing state of Wisconsin in the American Midwest - a predominantly white and predominantly rural location, and one of the states that gave President Trump his victory in 2016. He finds a state that is increasingly bitterly divided over identity politics and hot-button cultural issues like abortion and vaccination. Why are these 'culture wars' happening, asks Grayson, and what might help to overcome the divisions? To conclude the series, Grayson makes a map of the American culture wars, one which has strong implications for our own cultural and political divisions in the UK

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House, New Home
programme.desc: Architect George Clarke returns to unlock the potential of old houses. He meets teachers Simon and Sofie, whose 1930s Liverpool semi has lost its way thanks to a small kitchen squeezed into what would have been the wash house and some dodgy interior design choices made by the previous owner. Can he come up with a structural redesign and interior scheme with just £15,000? He also visits a medieval farmhouse in Kent that's like a perfectly preserved time capsule and needs an upgrade suitable for a young and rapidly growing family

programme.title: How to Beat
programme.desc: Kate Quilton and Dr Javid Abdelmoneim are joined by 10 volunteers, who each have a history of failed dieting, to take part in an experiment. The goal of the project is to find out if simple lifestyle techniques can help them lose weight in just six weeks. Kate and Javid also explore why increasingly plant-based diets are being used in sports, why men find weight-loss easier when doing it as part of a team, and whether people would snack less if they realised how much exercise it would take to burn off those calories

programme.title: Jamie: Keep Cooking Family Favourites
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver prepares a speedy tear-and-share dish featuring fillet of pork glazed in hoisin sauce and cooked with a giant soft-steamed bun, wrapped up with crunchy fresh vegetables. For a meat-free alternative to toad in the hole, the chef swaps sausages for portobello mushrooms, encased in a light and fluffy Yorkshire pudding and topped with decadent onion gravy

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Zoe Bailey hosts the first dinner party in Shropshire, and the Zumba instructor is hoping to entertain with a game of gargling while humming a tune. programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Artist and dairy farmer Penny Timmis hosts the second dinner party in Shropshire, hoping her dentist posing as a magician is enough to divert her guests' attention away from the possible animal hairs in their food

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Traffic reporter and radio DJ Paul Shuttleworth hosts the final dinner party in Shropshire, and hopes that an evening of unusual outfits, fun food and a bouncy castle will be enough to win him the £1,000 prize. programme.desc: Debra gets involved in a heated dispute with another parent at Ally's little league baseball match, but Ray fails to take her side because he is afraid of making himself unpopular. Dan Castellaneta, better known as the voice of Homer Simpson, guest stars

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: This episode features three people who experienced incredible adventures when they were younger, and how they had to adjust when life threw them off track. Barbara is rushed into St George's with a dangerously high heart rate, after the 74-year-old became dizzy while out shopping. Her daughter Ana discusses her mum and dad's phenomenal success in the jazz world, and how all that changed when Barbara was diagnosed with Parkinson's. John is brought into hospital, having woken up unable to move his right leg. Doctors are concerned he may have suffered a stroke. John shares tales of his glamorous life on the airlines in the 1960s

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Karen offends her stepdaughter, Olivia, during a shared Christmas break. Meanwhile, Grace attends a seasonal party at Will's mother's house, but accidentally breaks a treasured figurine and tries to blame another guest. Starring Debra Messing

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: One of Karen's embittered former classmates tries to take over Walker Inc to get her back for ruining his final year in high school. Meanwhile, Grace and Will take the day off and jump to conclusions when they spot Vince with a colleague. Jeff Goldblum guest stars

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Michael is deemed unfit to babysit after he fails a grandparenting course. American family sitcom about a father who stays at home and looks after the kids while their mother goes out to work. Starring Damon Wayans

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: The observational documentary shedding light on residential disputes concludes with an insight into how suburban feuds can breed anger, suspicion and fear, and cause people to resort to subterfuge to get their way. Among the stories highlighted are that of Leslie, whose neighbours began capturing his activities on film, convinced that his trade business was illegal, and Phil, who was assigned a restraining order after his ex-mayor neighbour made recordings that proved he was harassing her. Also featured are two tales in which old friendships were ruined when certain parties resorted to breaching each other's privacy and round-the-clock surveillance

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: When a body is found in woodland 12 hours after an elderly couple are reported missing, residents in a rural village react with shock at the thought of a killer in their midst. Police and forensic teams worked fast and quickly made an arrest, but soon another name was in the frame, although the search for this new suspect would lead detectives far and wide. One question remained, however. Where was the second body?

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Gareth and Mitch are on the trail of £2,500 in unpaid parking tickets in Cardiff, and while the debtor is not at home, they notice his car is sporting false number plates and call the police. The duo also face an angry defendant in Swindon when trying to collect £2,000 for unpaid rent on a lock-up, while in Buckinghamshire, Matt and Garry consider seizing a haul of luxury watches to pay more than £16,000 owed to a landlord

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Stewart and Elmor set out to evict a tenant from a property in Manchester but when the man claims he knew nothing about the court order tempers begin to fray. A car salesman in Cumbria is not happy about paying £4,500 to a dissatisfied customer, and in Shropshire a pub licensee claims she is unable to pay the rent she owes to her ex-landlord. With emotions running high, can she cut a new deal?

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!

programme.title: McDonald's vs Burger King: Burger Wars
programme.desc: Documentary examining how the fast food giants grew from humble origins to become two of the most recognisable brands in the world. Industry insiders also reveal the secrets behind both chains' success and how they see off the competition

programme.title: Will & Grace

programme.title: Will & Grace

American comedy, guest starring Jeff Goldblum and Edward Burns with Debra Messing and Megan Mullally

programme.title: My Wife and Kids

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Jay annoys Michael by attending the poker game he had arranged for men only, but he gets his own back by going to her book group

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: The investigation into the 2016 killing of 15-year-old Paige Doherty, who went missing on the way to her Saturday job in Clydebank - and whose body was discovered two days after she was reported missing. The documentary looks back at the police investigation as detectives retrace the teenager's last steps, and reveals how CCTV proved crucial in solving the crime

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Ben Reeve from Lewisham Council's Rogue Landlord Unit aims to help Lola, who stopped paying rent 18 months earlier in an effort to get her negligent landlord to deal with her dilapidated flat's many problems. Eviction specialists also come to the aid of Amit, who found himself continuing his late father's battle with a nightmare renter, and 70-year-old landlady Joan, who started receiving unnerving threats from her rent-skipping tenant after she started legal proceedings to get him evicted

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Stewart and Elmor are in Manchester to recover £4,000 owed to a firm of architects, only for the debtor to attempt to throw them off the scent. Stewart is joined by Vic in Liverpool to track down a landlord who owes his former tenants deposits totalling £5,000, while Gareth and Mitch are in for a surprise when they chase a builder in Wiltshire

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Stewart and Vic take on an eviction case in Nottingham, where a landlord wants his property back after months of rent arrears and alleged anti-social behaviour - and find themselves confronted by a volatile tenant who insists he has the right to stay and refuses to back down. The duo also chase £5,000 for an unpaid parking fine, which comes as a shock to the debtor, who has clearly hit hard times

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Matt and Garry try to recover more than £6,000 owed in nursery fees in Warwickshire, while Gary and Cona head to West Sussex, chasing £11,000 owed by a businessman who has defaulted on a previous plan, and have no option but to break into the property. The pair also head down to the south coast of England, seeking more than £3,500 owed for an unpaid loan

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Matt and Garry are in Wolverhampton, where a woman who owes £2,000 in parking fines denies knowing the debtor - despite being a relative. But when her mother also gets involved, tempers start to fray. Stewart and Iain confront a woman in Cheshire who is refusing to pay fees to a veterinary practice, claiming her dog has been misdiagnosed, while Paul and Max collect £5,000 owed by a banned company director in east London accused of mis-selling assets on the stock market

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: A police chase ends with the driver of a stolen Lexus crashing the luxury motor, and the police interception unit deals with an Essex girl whose car is 'too sexy' for the law. Elsewhere, a high-speed pursuit results in a head-on collision with one of the team's vehicles

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Officers follow a stolen BMW fitted with a tracking device as it heads for a cargo ship, while a drunk driver is pursued through Epping Forest. Documentary series profiling the work of a high-speed police interception unit in Essex

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The first instalment of a two-part crossover with NCIS: New Orleans sees the Washington, DC team co-operating with their colleagues from the Big Easy to investigate a spate of lethal poisonings on board a New Orleans-to-DC flight. All the evidence seems to point to missing chef Luca, who happens to be Abby's brother, so the two investigative services join forces to locate him, and find out why a private tech firm seems to have been targetted by the killer. Naval crime drama, guest starring Scott Bakula

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A woman lies in a coma after being found with a bullet in her head, leaving Briscoe and Logan to investigate whether her abusive husband is responsible for shooting her. Police drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A Japanese nightclub owner is killed while visiting New York, and a singer who once worked for the victim is arrested on suspicion of murder. While working on the case, Olivet is forced to confront memories of her sexual assault. Guest starring Laura Linney

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Assistant DAs McCoy and Kincaid put their careers on the line in search of the truth behind the death of a wealthy woman. Meanwhile, detectives question the victim's first and second husbands, and her teenage daughter

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A taxi-driver is found dead in his car, and Logan follows a chain of evidence involving a loan shark, a forged cheque and a missing plumber that leads him to believe the victim's wife is the killer. Police drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Logan and Briscoe investigate the murder of a psychiatrist, and their inquiries lead them to suspect the killer is either the victim's former husband, her obstructive father or a patient with multiple personality disorder

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A gay city councillor is shot dead after a meeting, and the trail of suspicion leads the team to a bigoted rival politician and a male prostitute. Police drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team joins forces with military investigators to ascertain whether terrorists were responsible for an explosion at a golf course in which a marine colonel was killed. As inquiries proceed, McGee has to use his computer skills to break into secret government files to ensure the murderers are apprehended. Crime drama, starring Mark Harmon

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A former marine falls to his death from a hotel balcony, and investigations quickly lead to the discovery of another body. As Gibbs and the team dig deeper, they uncover evidence that points to the activities of a vice ring trafficking young girls. Mark Harmon, David McCallum, Michael Weatherly and Pauley Perrette star

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: McGee tries to help his sister, who believes she may have murdered someone - but is too traumatised and disorientated to remember exactly what happened. As the team investigates the connected case of a sailor's death, Tony and Abby find themselves distracted by relationship problems. Drama, starring Sean Murray, Michael Weatherly and Pauley Perrette

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Two FBI agents try to seize control of the team's investigation into the discovery of a perfectly preserved body hidden in a chimney at a marine base. Reluctant to be ousted from the case, Gibbs agrees to work with them - and learns the victim was a serial killer responsible for the deaths of 14 people. Meanwhile, McGee's literary efforts lead to discord with the others

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: A Russian Mob leader's daughter is killed in what initially appears to be an act of gangland revenge against her father - until the focus of the investigation shifts to one of her classmates, who has an altogether more personal reason for wanting her dead. Drama, starring Vincent D'Onofrio

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The trial of pimp Bart Ganzel begins. Meanwhile, Detective Cassidy is accused of raping a woman while undercover, resulting in a court appearance of his own. Hard-hitting and emotional series chronicling the life and crimes of the New York Police Department, starring Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A sports reporter seeks Benson's help to accuse a cameraman of rape, but only agrees to press charges after she discovers the man is stalking her. Before the trial begins the team finds out she is pregnant, and ADA Barba must contend with questionable defence tactics as a result

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A boy is kidnapped while in the care of his father, and the investigation reminds the officers of an unsolved abduction that occurred in the same neighbourhood 13 years earlier. Benson vows to learn from past mistakes to set both cases right. Mariska Hargitay stars

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A girl disappears after following her older sister to a college party in Manhattan. The SVU detectives pull together to find her, but are thwarted by a hi-tech kidnapper using the internet to cover his tracks. As the case stalls, DA Barba (guest star Raul Esparza) returns with some unlikely help. Meanwhile, Rollins is distracted when her troubled sister suddenly turns up

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Logan and Wheeler are partnered with reluctant detective Harry Williams from the gang unit to investigate the murder of a local rapper who was encouraging his fans to report crimes. However, the pair soon begin to suspect their new colleague is operating on the wrong side of the law. Kirk 'Sticky Fingaz' Jones and Fab Five Freddy guest star, alongside Chris Noth and Julianne Nicholson

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: The members of an evangelical church close ranks to protect their leader, an influential preacher whose wife has been found dead. As Goren struggles to find her killer, he is distracted by fears over his mother's worsening health - and an encounter with his estranged brother. Guest starring Tom Arnold

programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV and technological advances are helping to bring criminals to justice. programme.desc: The murder of an undercover narcotics agent during a drugs raid splits Kincaid and McCoy over whether or not to ask for the newly reinstated death penalty. Ultimately, District Attorney Schiff must make the call. Crime drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jill Hennessy

programme.desc: An American couple are attacked in Iraq, in the very same spot a group of US Special Ops snipers were ambushed six months earlier. Determined to get to the bottom of the case, Gibbs is forced to speak to Aaron Davis, the only survivor of the first assault, who is now struggling through PTSD at the Walter Reed Medical Centre. The 300th episode of the military crime drama, starring Mark Harmon, David McCallum and Pauley Perrette

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A man who served as a juror in the trial of a mobster is shot dead at a baseball game, leading to a battle of wills between McCoy and his long-time friend - the suspect's attorney. Crime drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The body of a drug addict is discovered in the yard of a daycare centre, and evidence reveals she was the heiress to the fortune. However, suspicions are raised when the family's lawyer gets power of attorney over the trust fund. Police drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: An abortion clinic doctor is murdered, and when Logan and Briscoe investigate, they begin to suspect members of a radical movement led by a former priest, who appears to have no sympathy for the man's fate. Starring Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: An investigation into three murders in the offices of a magazine places the detectives in the middle of a fierce family feud, involving a protective matriarch, warring siblings and a corrupt judge. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Benjamin Bratt

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The detectives respond to a hold-up committed by a bloodthirsty team of robbers in ski-masks, and McCoy struggles to determine whether the teenage tearaway found with the criminals was an unwilling hostage or a active participant in the crimes

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis try to solve the murder of a college student whose death was depicted in graphic detail on the internet. However, the investigation grinds to a halt when they encounter a lawyer who is unwilling to reveal vital information about her client's past

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team tries to find out who was responsible for sabotaging a robotic vehicle that caused the death of a Navy lieutenant and almost killed Abby. Meanwhile, Ziva's suspicions are aroused by the discovery that Tony is repeatedly visiting the hospital. Drama, starring Pauley Perrette, Michael Weatherly, Cote de Pablo and Mark Harmon

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The discovery of a dead marine intelligence officer in a motel room sets the team off on a hunt for her killer. Although the town's authorities have allegedly already investigated the crime, Gibbs is determined to conduct his own thorough inquiries - which may lead him to a terrorist cell. Drama, starring Mark Harmon

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A marine major is found dead in an underground maintenance room, having scratched out one of his own eyes - and the presence of a webcam suggests someone watched him die. The team investigates with the help of Lt Col Hollis Mann, and links the case to wanted terrorist Mamoun Sharif, an old adversary who is threatening to unleash a chemical attack

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The agents try to track down an arms dealer who has the launch codes for the Navy's encrypted satellite defence system and is offering them to the highest bidder. In an attempt to win the confidence of the buyer, Ducky poses as an ageing Englishman trying to sell the information. Guest starring Armand Assante, with David McCallum and Mark Harmon

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Part two of two. ADA Stone blames himself for the shocking verdict in Sam's case, and before Benson can offer help, Sam makes a tragic decision. Mariska Hargitay stars

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: When a high-school teen is gang-raped at a rock concert, Amaro finds himself trying to save the reputation of the prime suspect, an army veteran with Post-Traumatic Stress Disorder and a fragmented memory of exactly what happened on the night concerned. Jeffrey Tambor guest stars alongside Mariska Hargitay and Ice-T

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Two surprise sniper attacks on the NYPD leave the SVU squad scrambling for answers. When the link between the shootings appears to be Detective Tutuola, he reconnects with his former Narcotics partner to uncover a possible motive tied to their old cases. As the violence continues, Lieutenant Eames joins the investigation and the unit races to hunt down a killer no one saw coming

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A man goes on a killing spree, leaving Benson and the team to detain a prostitute who is part of his social circle. As the detectives work with her to track down their quarry, they find themselves drawn into her world and must fight to save her life. Hard-hitting drama, starring Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The SVU's holiday celebrations are disrupted when Detective Tutuola's ex-brother-in-law is arrested for a brutal attack of a priest just before Christmas. He protests his innocence despite a significant criminal record, and appeals to the force to find evidence that exonerates him. In the process, a buried church scandal begins to unravel. Starring Ice-T, Olivia Benson and Nick Amaro

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Goren and Eames investigate the murder of a surgeon who provided deaf patients with controversial cochlear implants. After ruling out the involvement of a rival doctor, the detectives suspect a radical deaf playwright may be responsible for the crime. Vincent D'Onofrio and Kathryn Erbe star

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: A married astronaut is suspected of killing his lover, a female colleague who was murdered while speaking at a conference - but Goren and the team also have to consider that she may have been killed by a rival whose seat she took on a future mission. Starring Vincent D'Onofrio and Kathryn Erbe, with Tate Donovan and Amy Ryan

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV and technological advances are helping to bring criminals to justice. The programme reveals how essential surveillance cameras have become in the fight against crime and features footage of people caught red-handed

programme.title: Animal Cops Philadelphia
programme.desc: Officers from the Pennsylvania SPCA respond to a call concerning abandoned animals, but are unprepared for what they discover inside a fridge

programme.title: Animal Cops Philadelphia

programme.title: Animal Cops Houston
programme.desc: A rookie animal carer wins the hearts of everyone at the Houston SPCA centre by performing emergency surgery on a dog that has a rusty metal chain embedded in its neck

programme.title: Ambulance
programme.desc: The fourth episode follows the West Midlands Ambulance Service at the beginning of a busy Saturday night shift. There has been a nasty car accident in Warwickshire and the young driver has suffered a collapsed lung. She needs a life-saving procedure by the road-side which can only be done by a doctor. In the busy control room, call assessors Rowena and Sally both deal with suicidal patients on the phone, while a woman has had her finger bitten off during an argument

programme.title: Money for Nothing

programme.title: The Hotel Inspector
programme.desc: Alex Polizzi comes to the rescue of more struggling establishments, beginning in Cornwall with 16-bedroom hotel the Fieldhead in Looe run by Julian and Gill Peck. Despite stunning sea views and a traditional approach to customer service, Alex soon finds that old-fashioned values may be the cause of the plunging occupancy rates, with a barely comprehensible booking system and an unsustainable work-life balance meaning that both the business and the couple's home life are at risk

programme.title: The Madeleine McCann Mystery
programme.desc: When three-year-old Briton Madeleine McCann disappeared from her Praia da Luz holiday apartment in May 2007, it shocked the world. Still unsolved, new analysis is made to try to discover the truth about what may have happened to her

programme.title: Ghost Adventures
programme.desc: Ghost hunters Zak Bagans, Nick Groff and Aaron Goodwin visit the Old Montana State Prison, which is said to be haunted by the consequences of a deadly 1959 prison riot. During the lockdown, the trio witness camera batteries inexplicably explode and fizzle acid

Ben and Sophie answer a call from a terrified mother whose toddler is having a seizure, and reports of a hanging come into the control centre - but with no sign of a patient, the staff must decide whether the call is a hoax. Paramedics Helen and Julie try to find temporary accommodation for a homeless patient

programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the team return to Veterans Street in Manchester, where, in 2015, with the help of Prince William and Prince Harry, DIY SOS launched their most ambitious project yet - transforming a derelict street into a vibrant community for veterans and local people. programme.desc: A secretly gay barrister discovers his lover has been driven to suicide by blackmailers, who have also extorted money from several other men. Risking his reputation and marriage, he hunts down the culprits, fully aware that it could lead to his own exposure as a homosexual, illegal at the time. Drama, starring Dirk Bogarde, Sylvia Syms, Dennis Price and Anthony Nicholls

programme.title: Malachi's Cove (1973)

programme.title: Jamie's School Dinners
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver takes over the kitchen of Kidbrooke School in Greenwich, hoping to re-educate the junk food-loving children by introducing a healthy diet to improve concentration and eliminate long-term problems of obesity and heart disease. He joins forces with dinner lady Nora in his Feed Me Better campaign, aiming to promote nutritious dishes throughout the capital's schools before encouraging the rest of the country to follow suit

programme.title: The Food Hospital
programme.desc: Patients suffering with a wide range of ailments are invited to attend the Food Hospital, to find out to what extent specially tailored food treatment programmes can help. Specialist dieticians aim to integrate certain food in the patient's diet to assess the beneficial health properties of food, while simultaneously discrediting widely-held old wives' tales.

programme.title: Budding Business

programme.desc: The story of Green Bay Packers' 2010 Super Bowl success over Pittsburgh Steelers at the Cowboys Stadium in Arlington, Texas. programme.title: NFL: America's Game
programme.desc: Revisiting Dallas Cowboys' 1995 Super Bowl victory over Pittsburgh Steelers at the Sun Devil Stadium in Tempe, Arizona. Dallas tied the record set by the San Francisco 49ers in the previous year by claiming their fifth Vince Lombardi trophy with a 27-17 victory. They also became the first team to win the showpiece match three times in four years
